entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop being studied for salt tolerance

entities.name: SALT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition caused by high salinity that negatively impacts plant reproduction and yield

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea genotypes to maintain productivity under salt stress

entities.name: POT EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Controlled experimental setup used to compare tolerant and sensitive chickpea lines under salt application

entities.name: SALT APPLICATION
entities.description: The method of applying 17 g NaCl kg−1 Alfisol to the soil

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The overall development and biomass accumulation of the plant

entities.name: CANOPY TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water loss from the plant's canopy, used as a physiological indicator

entities.name: PLANT ARCHITECTURE
entities.description: The structural organization of the plant, including branching patterns

entities.name: FLOWER NUMBER
entities.description: The total number of flowers produced, identified as a constitutive trait for salinity tolerance

entities.name: POD NUMBER
entities.description: The total number of pods developed

entities.name: SEED NUMBER
entities.description: The total number of seeds produced, identified as an adaptive trait for salinity tolerance

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The final productivity of the plant in terms of seed mass

entities.name: SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the above-ground plant parts

entities.name: FLOWERING DURATION
entities.description: The length of the period during which the plant flowers

entities.name: PODDING DURATION
entities.description: The length of the period during which pods develop

entities.name: FLOWER ABORTION
entities.description: The percentage of flowers that fail to develop into pods

entities.name: POD ABORTION
entities.description: The percentage of pods that fail to develop into seeds

entities.name: PRIMARY BRANCH NUMBER
entities.description: The number of first-order branches, found to be higher in sensitive lines

entities.name: TERTIARY BRANCH NUMBER
entities.description: The number of third-order branches, identified as a constitutive trait for salinity tolerance

entities.name: RELATIVE TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The transpiration rate of tolerant lines compared to sensitive lines under salt stress

entities.name: SOWING
entities.description: The initial stage of planting where salt application was tested

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The reproductive stage where salt application was tested

entities.name: TOLERANT LINES
entities.description: Chickpea genotypes that maintain higher reproductive success under salt stress

entities.name: SENSITIVE LINES
entities.description: Chickpea genotypes that show significant yield decrease under salt stress

is a critical constitutive trait for
